zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Willington於大約1371年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Sir John Willington31歲，母親Matilda Carminow26歲。她於大約1400年與William Beaumont在英國格盧斯特斯爾桑德爾斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1424年4月24日在英國戴文享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Willington于大约1371年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Sir John Willington31岁，母亲Matilda Carminow26岁。她于大约1400年与William Beaumont在英国格盧斯特斯爾桑德爾斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1424年4月24日在英国戴文享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Willington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from any or all of the places named Willington (Beds, Cheshire, Derbys, Durham, Northumb, Warwicks), but there is little evidence from NE England.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Willington was born about 1371, in Cornwall, England, her father, Sir John Willington, was 31 and her mother, Matilda Carminow, was 26. She married William Beaumont about 1400, in Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 24 April 1424, in Devon, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Willington est née environ 1371, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Willington, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Matilda Carminow, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Beaumont environ 1400, à Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 24 avril 1424, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Willington um 1371 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Willington 31 und ihre Mutter Matilda Carminow 26. Sie hat um 1400 in Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England William Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. April 1424 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Willington è nata il circa 1371 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir John Willington, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Matilda Carminow, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William Beaumont circa 1400, nel Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 aprile 1424, nel Devon, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Willingtonが約1371年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir John Willingtonは31歳，母Matilda Carminowは26歳であった。約1400年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアサンドハルストでWilliam Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1424年4月24日にイギリスデボンで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Willington(이)가 대략 1371년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Willington(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Carminow(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 영국 그루스스터실르 샌드후르스트에서 William Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 4월 24일 영국 데폰에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Willington nasceu aproximadamente 1371, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Willington, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Carminow, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William Beaumont aproximadamente 1400, em Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 24 de abril de 1424, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Willington родилась около 1371 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Willington было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda Carminow, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Beaumont около 1400 г. в местности сэндхурст, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 24 апреля 1424 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Willington nació aproximadamente 1371, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Willington, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Matilda Carminow, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William Beaumont aproximadamente 1400, en Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de abril de 1424, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
